name: Homemade Meusli Oatmeal Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir with a wire whisk until evenly combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container with a 10-cup capacity.
4. Label the container with the date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 6 months.
